app.name: EduCore
app.tagline: A warm place to learn, grow, and feel proud.
app.description: Sign in whenever you are ready — there is never any rush, and we will meet you with encouragement.

auth.signInSubtitle: Take a slow breath — we will stay with you for every try, no rush and no judgment.
auth.emailHelper: We will never share your email — it is only for your secure sign-in.
auth.passwordHelper: Real API registration needs at least 8 characters — we kept yours cozy and long enough.
auth.peekDesign: Peek at the cozy design system
auth.loginError: Double-check your email and password, then give it another gentle try.
auth.welcomeMessage: We are so glad you are here — let us keep growing together.
auth.signInAgain: Let's sign in again — we'll pick up right where you left off.

student.subtitle: Take whatever pace feels right — we will celebrate the tiny wins and the big leaps alike.
student.continueSubtitle: Your next session is a gentle invitation, never a demand.
student.practiceLab: Pick up today's adventure — practice lab
student.discoverySession: Discovery session — explore how you shine
student.reviewNotes: Review notes — turns stumbles into stepping stones
student.nurturedSkills: You have nurtured {{count}} shining skills in {{module}} — keep watering what you love.
student.streakRhythm: You are building a lovely rhythm.

diagnostic.title: Diagnostic
diagnostic.heading: Explore how you shine
diagnostic.subtitle: This is not a test — it is a curious walk together so we can celebrate your strengths first.
diagnostic.welcomeDesc: We go one gentle question at a time. There is no timer breathing down your neck — only encouragement.
diagnostic.nextPending: The next prompt is almost ready
diagnostic.nextDesc: Our learning service is still wiring up live questions — you are connected, and we will fill this space with joy as soon as it arrives.
diagnostic.wrapUp: Wrap up and see my summary
diagnostic.continueReview: ↩ Let us review the next one together
diagnostic.reportDesc: We could not fetch your discovery report yet — your effort still counts, and you can try again whenever you feel ready.
diagnostic.strengthsTitle: Here is what you are amazing at
diagnostic.weaknessesTitle: Here is where we will grow together
diagnostic.defaultWeakness: Tiny skills we will nurture with patience
diagnostic.defaultEncouragement: You showed up with courage — that already means the world.
diagnostic.reportPlaceholderDesc: The server sent a friendly placeholder — as soon as the full story arrives, it will appear right here.

checkin.title: Daily weather check
checkin.heading: How is the weather in your world, {{name}}?
checkin.subtitle: No right answers here — just a quiet moment to notice how you feel. Your check-ins are yours alone.
checkin.alreadyCheckedIn: You checked in today — thank you for sharing
checkin.feelingsSeen: Your feelings are seen and valued.
checkin.canUpdate: Feelings can shift through the day. Want to update your weather?
checkin.pickSubtitle: Tap the one that feels closest right now — you can always come back and update it.
checkin.saveError: We could not save your check-in. Please try again — your feelings matter.
checkin.addNote: Want to add a few words? (optional)
checkin.notePlaceholder: No pressure — just if something is on your mind...
checkin.historyEmpty: Your check-in story starts today. Each day adds a new chapter.
checkin.loadError: We could not load your check-in space
checkin.loadErrorDesc: Something drifted out of sync — your feelings still matter. Please try again.

warm.loading2: Almost there — setting the table for your learning…
warm.errorTitle: We could not load your home snapshot
warm.errorDesc: Something went wrong on our end while fetching progress — your effort still matters; please try again.
warm.tinyBumpDesc: The next question could not load just yet — a quick refresh often helps.
warm.startFailed: Starting did not work this time.
warm.journeyStartFailed: We could not start the journey yet — please try again in a moment.
warm.chooseAnswer: Choose or type an answer first — we will wait right here with you.
warm.answerFailed: Sending that answer did not go through — want to give it another gentle try?
warm.unexpected: Unexpected sign-in response — our team is on it.
warm.heartWelcome: Your heart space is ready — take a slow breath and let your feelings bloom.
warm.heartJournalSaved: Your journal entry is tucked away safely. That moment matters.
warm.heartProudAdded: You added something to your proud wall — share it whenever you feel ready!
warm.heartMoodTracked: Your mood is noted with care. Patterns will appear in time.
warm.heartOfflineSaved: Your heartfelt moment is saved — it will sync when you're back online.

heart.title: Heart Space
heart.description: Your personal space for emotions and growth
heart.offlineHint: You are offline — some features are limited

journal.title: Growth Diary
journal.subtitle: Write about your day
journal.placeholder: What happened today? How do you feel about it?
journal.empty: No journal entries yet. Start writing above!

proudWall.title: Proud Wall
proudWall.subtitle: Share and celebrate achievements
proudWall.empty: No proud moments yet. Be the first to share!

aiTutor.title: AI Tutor
aiTutor.subtitle: Ask me anything about your learning
aiTutor.welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm your AI tutor. Ask me anything about your studies!
aiTutor.errorMessage: I'm having trouble thinking right now. Please try again in a moment.
aiTutor.lowBandwidthHint: Low bandwidth mode — older messages hidden

donation.title: Support Our Mission
donation.subtitle: Help us provide quality education for every child.
donation.thankYouDesc: Your donation helps us create better learning experiences for everyone.
donation.projectDesc: EduCore is dedicated to building a warm and accessible learning platform for children in underserved communities. Every donation directly funds curriculum development, server infrastructure, scholarships, and teacher training — bringing personalized learning support to more children.
donation.transparencyDesc: Every cent goes toward advancing educational equity. Here's how we allocate funds:
donation.fundsCurriculumDesc: Interactive exercises, AI tutoring, diagnostic assessments
donation.fundsScholarshipDesc: Free learning resources for families in need
donation.fundsTrainingDesc: Training teachers to use the platform effectively
donation.storiesTeacherQuote: Since using EduCore, the children in our mountain school have experienced personalized learning for the first time.
donation.storiesStudentQuote: I used to think math was hard. Now I look forward to opening EduCore every day to practice.
donation.storiesPrincipalQuote: This platform doesn't just teach knowledge — it builds confidence in learning.
